name: Daniel Schäfer
title: SALES MANAGER
profile_summary: B2B sales manager with a track record of building pipeline and closing enterprise deals for software and AI products. Owns the full sales cycle from prospecting to negotiation and leads account strategy across the DACH region.

experience.title: Sales Manager
bullets: Own the full B2B sales cycle for Mona AI — prospecting, demos, negotiation and close.
Built and manage the DACH sales pipeline and consistently exceeded quarterly quota.
Develop key enterprise accounts and partner with product on customer requirements.
Established the company's CRM hygiene, forecasting cadence and sales playbook.

experience.title: Account Executive
bullets: Closed mid-market and enterprise SaaS deals across manufacturing and finance verticals.
Grew named-account revenue through upsell and multi-year renewals.

experience.title: Sales Development Representative
bullets: Generated qualified pipeline through outbound prospecting and discovery calls.

analysis.explanation: The CV exhibits good internal consistency regarding career progression, skills, and education. However, the provided LinkedIn profile URL was not reachable, which significantly hinders external verification of the candidate's professional presence and claims.
red_flags: LinkedIn profile URL not reachable, preventing external verification.
positive_signals: Consistent career progression from SDR to Sales Manager.
Skills listed align well with described job responsibilities.
